one_line_positioning: E-commerce growth leader who scaled user base from 10k to 500k and drove 200% organic traffic increase
narrative_angle: Customer-obsessed growth strategist with deep e-commerce scaling experience, aiming to bridge business metrics with AI-driven personalization
lead_strengths: Drove 200% organic traffic growth in 18 months
proof_points_to_emphasize: Increased organic traffic by 200% in 18 months
things_to_downplay: No software engineering or coding background
No LLM API or AI/ML experience
No SQL, frontend development, or Python/NodeJS skills
Lacks required engineering degree from IIT/BITS/NIT
tone_guidance: Business-strategic, outcome-focused, and transparent about technical skill gaps
recruiter_first_impression_target: A growth marketer applying for an AI engineering role — significant skill gap
reasoning: Missing all core technical must-haves (LLM API, Python/NodeJS, SQL, frontend, engineering degree). Evidence only supports marketing/growth achievements, not AI product engineering. High risk of failure in a CEO’s office technical role.
